name: mcp-server-firecrawl
description: Integrates Firecrawl for web scraping and data extraction.

rating.reason: The toolset demonstrates good documentation quality with comprehensive descriptions that include appropriate use cases, limitations, and usage examples. Tool names are clear and well-structured with consistent 'firecrawl_' prefix. Most parameters have adequate descriptions, though some complex nested schemas could benefit from more detailed explanations. The descriptions effectively communicate when to use each tool and common mistakes to avoid, which is valuable guidance for users.
